47.reason: [Error: The return value of DELETELINK2 is not assigned back to head[i].link, so the deletion from adjacency lists does not take effect. The function returns the updated list pointer, but it is ignored.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  The function DELETELINK2 returns the updated list, but the return value is not assigned back to head[i].link, so the deletion does not take effect. It should be head[i].link = DELETELINK2(head[i].link, m);
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: The return value of DELETELINK2 is not assigned back to head[i].link, so the deletion from adjacency lists does not take effect. The function returns the updated list pointer, but it is ignored.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  错误：DELETELINK2返回新的链表头，但未赋值回 head[i].link，邻接表中顶点m未被实际删除。
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Return value not assigned; should be head[i].link = DELETELINK2(head[i].link,m);
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  The return value of DELETELINK2 is ignored. Since DELETELINK2 may change the head of the adjacency list (if the first element is deleted), the updated pointer must be assigned back to head[i].link.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  The return value of DELETELINK2 is not assigned back to head[i].link, so the linked list structure is not updated correctly when the head node or other nodes are removed.
